body.title: Aider builder — multi-file coordinated-change task (the orientation gate DS died on)
body.description:
**Problem:** The first-run smoke (T-aider-builder-first-run) proved aider makes our models edit, but on a 2-file TOY (TTLCache). DS's actual death mode was read-wandering in a MULTI-MODULE repo (orientation, not serialization). A builder we're happy with must hold on a task requiring coordinated edits across files, oriented via aider's repo map.

**Proposed shape:** Add a multi-file task pack to devlab/claudecode/aider_smoke.py: a small package where a failing test requires a COORDINATED change across >=2 files while reading a 3rd (e.g. add Order.total() in models.py AND wire pricing.apply_discount into service.checkout()). Run both devstral-24b and qwen3-coder:30b@Hex, repo map ON (the orientation surface). Record: edits-applied, files-touched, tests-green, wall-clock.

**Affected files:** devlab/claudecode/aider_smoke.py (add task registry + --task flag); isolated sandbox (throwaway). No unseen_university/ changes.
**Design rules:** no aider imports; sandbox isolated (own git, no UU remote).
**Scope boundary:** the multi-file task + runs + recorded result. If aider holds -> file the AiderDevice wrapper ticket. If it struggles -> record where (orientation vs edit).
**Completion criteria:**
- aider completes the multi-file task (coordinated edits across >=2 files, failing test -> green) with at least one model, repo map on.
- Result recorded per model: files-touched, tests-green, wall-clock.
- Verdict on whether aider is 'a builder we're happy with' enough to wrap as a device.
**Test plan:** the sandbox pytest is the proof — RED (stubs) before aider, GREEN after; a NO-EDIT or EDITED-BUT-RED outcome is recorded as the honest datapoint (not forced green).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that aider is proven to hold on a realistic multi-file orientation task — the exact failure mode DS died on — before we wrap it as production infra, so 'a builder we're happy with' rests on evidence, not a 2-file toy. Serves the aider-builder-first standing intention.
body.result: aider GREEN on multi-file coordinated change, BOTH models: qwen3-coder:30b 5/5 in 17.0s, devstral-24b 5/5 in 38.8s. NO files pre-added — aider found shop/models.py + shop/service.py via repo map and made the coordinated 2-file edit (the exact orientation DS died on). Verdict: aider is a builder we're happy with on controlled tasks; justifies the device wrapper.
body.unproven_reason: behavioral red->green via aider_smoke.py --task checkout (reproducible); real-repo/real-ticket proof deferred to the AiderDevice wrapper; lever = the device running aider on an actual UU ticket against a repo clone
